nasb.text: And when the living creatures give glory and honor and thanks to Him who sits on the throne, to Him who lives forever and ever,

esv.text: And whenever the living creatures give glory and honor and thanks to him who is seated on the throne, who lives forever and ever,

cnv.text: 每逢四個活物把榮耀、尊貴、感謝獻給那坐在寶座上，活到永永遠遠的那一位的時候，

ccb.text: 每逢这些活物将荣耀、尊贵、感谢献给坐在宝座上、活到永永远远的那位时，

csbs.text: 每当四个活物把荣耀、尊贵和感谢归给坐在宝座上、活到永永远远的那一位时，
